Video.summary: Experience the thrilling showdown at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships as twin brothers Hunter Johnson and Yates Johnson face off for the very first time in the men's pro singles gold medal match. Both top seeds with years of experience playing doubles together, these brothers bring a unique dynamic filled with expert strategy, rapid exchanges, and emotional rivalry. From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Video.summary: Eva Welsher & Kyle Yates faced off against Milan Rane & Mircea Morariu in a Mixed Pro split age Quarterfinal match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2023 - Mixed Pro Split Age

Video.summary: Watch the Gold Medal match of the Women’s Pro Split Age division at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, where Parris Todd and Beth Bellamy team up to face Sheri Courter and Mari Humberg. Featuring cross-generational strategy, fast hands, and smart positioning, this match highlights the unique synergy of Split Age play. Recorded live from Zing Zang Championship Court in Naples, Florida.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg
US Open 2023 – Women’s Pro Split Age Gold – Todd & Bellamy vs Courter & Humberg

Video.summary: Watch Senior Pro’s Scott Crandall & Jose Derisi take on Altaf Merchant & Dayne Gingrich in a Semifinal match.

Video.summary: Tune in for a high-energy match between the Gilbert Gladiators and the Tempe Tornadoes at The Orchard in Scottsdale, Arizona. This April 25, 2023 episode of Tuesday Night Pickleball features fast-paced action and strategic plays as both teams battle it out in a pivotal match. With sharp shots, effective communication, and critical moments, the Gladiators and Tornadoes go head-to-head for a thrilling finish. Watch as the teams showcase their pickleball prowess in one of the most exciting events of the AZ PBL season.
Video.title: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Image.alt: Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes
Tuesday Night Pickleball 2023 – AZ PBL Team Match – Gladiators vs Tornadoes

Video.summary: Experience the "clash for the ages" as host city Mumbai Pickle Power takes on their fierce rivals, Delhi Dilwale, in a thrilling Day 2 encounter of the World Pickleball League Season 2. The day begins on a somber note with a tribute to the late Deputy Chief Minister of Maharashtra, Shri Ajit Pawar, as players compete with black armbands in front of a quieted stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: It's the final day of group stage matches on Super Sunday in the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as game Number Six features Pune United battling the Hyderabad Superstars.This is an important game for both teams as they fight for the last remaining spots in the semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Pune vs. Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 2

Video.summary: Experience the electrifying atmosphere at Mumbai’s Jio World Garden as the Mumbai Pickle Power hunt for their first tie victory of the season against the formidable Hyderabad Superstars. The tension reaches a fever pitch with Hyderabad’s "fireball" Shawn Mendes dominating the singles court, while Mumbai’s Brandon Lane and Santhosh Narayanan aim to turn the tide in the critical doubles matchups. Witness high-risk "Pickle Plays" and strategic substitutions as these athletes battle for precious points on the road to the semi-finals. With both teams fighting for survival on the league leaderboard, every rally is a masterclass in professional grit and tactical brilliance.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2
WPBL 2026 - Hyderabad vs Mumbai - Day 7 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League (WPBL) continues on Day 5 at the CCI Brabourne Stadium with a clash between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Chennai Super Champs.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Chennai - Day 5 Tie 2

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a high-stakes Tie 5 showdown. Pune United enters the arena hungry for their first points of the season, facing off against a confident Hyderabad Superstars squad coming off a fresh victory. Watch as top-tier athletes like Katie Morris, Shawn Mendes, and William Sobeck battle through a gauntlet of Women’s Singles, Mixed Doubles, and Men’s Doubles matches. With "hands battles" at the net and strategic "pickle plays" in full effect, every point is a testament to the speed and precision of professional pickleball.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Pune vs Hyderabad - Day 3 Tie 1

Video.summary: In the finals of the All Florida Pro League (AFPL) Stop 4 in Sarasota, Florida, the Fort Myers Flamingos and the GMV Chomp go head-to-head. The commentators, including Angel, highlight the youth and fire of Fort Myers player Jade and the consistent dominance of the number one women's team, the GMV Chomp. The match is a best-of-three, rally-scoring format with games to 21. The episode showcases impressive plays from Stevie and Kelsey, and praises Heather Nobler's "nasty" two-handed backhand. The commentators also discuss the challenge for the team coming out of pool number two, which has less rest time before the finals.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 7 - GNV Chomp vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: Championship Court hosts a star-studded final as brothers Ben and Collin Johns take on Matt Wright and Riley Newman in this Men’s Pro Doubles finale. Packed with elite strategy, blistering hand battles, and dramatic swings, this is top-tier pickleball at its most intense.
Video.title: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman

Image.alt: US Open 2022 – Men’s Pro Doubles Final – Johns & Johns vs Wright & Newman
